arts.ttl: I spotted Ruben Amorim shouting at Manchester United player - before admitting his own mistake
arts.sum: Man Utd lost 1-0 against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League and here are the moments you might have missed.

arts.ttl: 'Not really' - Anthony Elanga makes honest admission about his goal vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga came back to haunt Man United on Tuesday night, scoring the winner for Nottingham Forest at the City Ground to seal a 1-0 triumph.

arts.ttl: 'Not that good' - Amorim reacts to Alejandro Garnacho performance for Manchester United
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho underperformed again for Man United on a regressive night for the winger at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Amorim: I won't get much time to fix Utd woes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insisted he will not be given much time to turn things around as Manchester United manager, as his team slumped to another defeat at Nottingham Forest on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Amorim: We lacked quality in the final third
arts.sum: And despite controlling possession for large parts of the encounter, Amorim acknowledged his side's lack of quality in decisive moments when searching for a goal. "We already knew that this team [Forest] can score goals out of nothing.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Man Utd eye £40m move for Liam Delap
arts.sum: Is Ipswich's Liam Delap the one to solve Manchester United's goal-scoring woes? Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rejects claim that Man United were wrong to sell Anthony Elanga after his wondergoal winner for Nottingham Forest against his old club
arts.sum: Man United boss Ruben Amorim has hit back at suggestions that the Red Devils made a mistake by selling Anthony Elanga to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest 1-0 Man United: Misfiring Red Devils equal unwanted club record in defeat at the City Ground
arts.sum: Manchester United equal an unwanted club Premier League record in their 1-0 defeat at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Anthony Elanga reveals the secrets behind lung-busting 85m run for solo winning goal against his old club Man United
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga scored a sensational solo goal against his old club to give Nottingham Forest their first league double over Manchester United in 33 years on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim points finger at Man Utd players and hits back at critics
arts.sum: Manchester United sunk to another defeat as they lost 1-0 to Nottingham Forest on Tuesday and Ruben Amorim wasn't impressed with his players, who 'helped' their opponents beat them
